title: Infineon Design System Overview
webComponentsDescription: Web Components are native browser standards that enable creation of reusable, encapsulated UI elements:

technologies.name: Custom Elements
technologies.description: Define new HTML tags (e.g., `<ifx-button>`) with custom behavior

technologies.name: Shadow DOM
technologies.description: Encapsulated DOM subtree and styling, isolated from document DOM

benefits.title: Framework Agnostic
benefits.description: Works in React, Vue, Angular, Svelte, or vanilla HTML

benefits.title: Future Proof
benefits.description: Built on browser standards, not tied to any framework

benefits.title: Performant
benefits.description: Lazy loading, tree-shaking, minimal bundle size

benefits.title: Accessible
benefits.description: WCAG compliant out of the box

benefits.title: Themable
benefits.description: CSS custom properties for easy customization

benefits.title: Encapsulated
benefits.description: Styles don't leak in or out (Shadow DOM)
